stemHtml:
Prior to departure, the load controller informs the pilot about a LMC of 4763 kg loaded in the aft cargo compartment. Can the pilot accept it?

Take-off fuel: 8000 kg
Take-off CG: 44%
Take-off Mass: 60 000 kg
Underload: 5687 kg (bigger than the LMC)
CG limit: 16% - 46%
Operating Mass: 55 000 kg

MAC length: 4 m
Arm of the aft cargo compartment: 15.5 m aft of the datum
Distance of MAC trailing edge: 16 m aft of the datum

options.a: No, because only the passengers can accept LMC.
options.b: Yes, because it will exceed the aft limit only by 1% and it is acceptable.
options.c: Yes, because it will be within CG limits.
options.d: No, because it will be outside of the CG limits.
